<type>file</type>
<content>
1: # Brand spec — Manual de Identidad Visual
2: 
3: Source: User-provided design tokens spec (Tailwind-like CSS). Accent updated from blue-600 to orange-500 (#FF7A05) per later instruction.
4: 
5: ## Color tokens (CSS)
6: 
7: ```css
8: --bg:             #F8FAFC;    /* slate-50   — fondo principal */
9: --surface:        #FFFFFF;    /* white      — tarjetas, modales */
10: --fg:             #0F172A;    /* slate-900  — títulos, texto principal */
11: --muted:          #475569;    /* slate-600  — cuerpo, metadata */
12: --accent:         #FF7A05;    /* orange-500 — acciones, enlaces, hover */
13: --accent-lighter: #FFF0E0;    /* orange-100 — fondos sutiles (hover de navegación, alertas) */
14: --accent-light:   #FFC490;    /* orange-300 — bordes de alerta, variantes outline */
15: --accent-dark:    #E06900;    /* orange-600 — hover de botón primary */
16: --accent-darker:  #A34A00;    /* orange-800 — active states, foco */
17: --border:         #E2E8F0;    /* slate-200  — bordes, separadores */
18: ```
19: 
20: ### Escala completa de acento (orange)
21: 
22: | Shade | Hex       | Uso                            |
23: |-------|-----------|--------------------------------|
24: | 50    | #FFF7ED   | Fondo de página, secciones     |
25: | 100   | #FFEDD5   | Hover sutil, fondos alternos   |
26: | 200   | #FFD6B0   | Bordes decorativos             |
27: | 300   | #FFB875   | Badge outline, hover secundario|
28: | 400   | #FF9633   | Iconos, acentos secundarios    |
29: | **500** | **#FF7A05** | **Acento principal (base)**  |
30: | 600   | #E06900   | Hover botón primary            |
31: | 700   | #C25800   | Active button                  |
32: | 800   | #A34A00   | États focus profundos          |
33: | 900   | #853800   | Máximo contraste sobre fondo   |
34: 
35: ## Font stacks
36: 
37: No typefaces specified → inferred from the design tokens' Tailwind/system aesthetic:
38: 
39: ```
40: --font-display: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Display', system-ui, sans-serif;
41: --font-body:    -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', system-ui, sans-serif;
42: --font-mono:    ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', Menlo, monospace;
43: ```
44: 
45: ## Spacing system
46: 
47: All margins/paddings in multiples of 8px (Tailwind scale: p-2 = 8px, p-4 = 16px, p-6 = 24px, p-8 = 32px).
48: 
49: ## Layout rules
50: 
51: - Border radius: 8px (rounded-lg)
52: - Headings: font-weight 700, color = --fg (slate-900)
53: - Body: font-weight 400, color = --muted (slate-600)
54: - Accent budget: one decisive orange presence per component. Never flood both border + background + text with orange simultaneously.

(End of file - total 54 lines)
</content>

name: bash
output:
Usage:
  od [--port <n>] [--host <addr>] [--no-open]
      Start the local daemon and open the web UI.

  od tools live-artifacts <create|list|update|refresh> [options]
      Manage live artifacts through daemon wrapper commands.

  od artifacts create --name <path> --input <file> [--project <id-or-name>]
      Create a normal project artifact through the local daemon.

  od tools connectors <list|execute|github-design-context> [options]
      Discover and execute configured connectors.

  od tools design-systems read --path <manifest-declared-path>
      Read active design-system pull-layer files through daemon wrapper commands.

  od mcp live-artifacts
      Start the MCP server exposing live-artifact and connector tools.

  od research search --query <text> [--max-sources 5] [--daemon-url <url>]
      Run agent-callable Tavily research through the local daemon.

  od plugin <list|info|install|uninstall|apply|doctor|replay|trust> [args]
      Discover, install, and apply plugins through the local daemon.
  od plugin publish-repo <folder>
      Create/update the author's GitHub repo for a local plugin folder.
  od plugin open-design-pr <folder>
      Push a community-catalog branch and open the Open Design PR form.

  od automation <list|get|create|update|run|runs|pause|resume|delete> [args]
      Drive the Automations surface headlessly. Same store as the UI's
      Automations tab, so an external agent (hermes, openclaw, ...) can
      schedule, trigger, or harvest results from a routine without
      opening the web UI.

  od memory tree <list|view|edit|move> [args]
      Inspect and edit the memory tree that is injected into agent prompts.

  od ui <list|show|respond|revoke|prefill> [args]
      Read and answer GenUI surfaces (form / choice / confirmation / oauth-prompt) headlessly.

content:
No reconozco un comando `/search` en Open Design. ¿A qué te refieres? Opciones posibles:

- **`od research search --query "..."`** — búsqueda web vía Tavily
- **Buscar en los archivos del proyecto** — puedo usar glob/grep en los archivos existentes
- **Indexar el brand spec** para que aparezca en búsquedas del proyecto

¿Cuál necesitas?
